steps.title: Follow the stage action
steps.content: As the narrator walks across the stage, she says she did what her teacher had advised: pretend she is playing for only one person so she will not be nervous.

steps.title: Connect advice to behavior
steps.content: The narrator then looks at her father in the front row, implying she is using the teacher's strategy to manage nervousness. A, B, and C introduce thoughts about solo performance, excitement, or practice that the text does not mention. The answer is D.
